Huangfu Kai зҡҮз”«й—“
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huangfu Kai (зҡҮз”«й—“). Officer of Wei and, later, Jin. Joined Zhong Hui in his conquest of Hanzhong. Huangfu Kai was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
